title: 準2級プラス 模擬テスト10 読解 1
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, space exploration has become very popular in London. Since 2016, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 17 more events related to space exploration.
explanation: pre2plus-10-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

prompt:
